title: Detention Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Detention Center''' was the prison on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']]. Located near the ship's belly, it was unmarked so that prisoners would not struggle as much knowing they'd reached the "end of the line."

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
